title: Natural Selection 2

notes: This game will no longer run. Without forcing proton compatibility - I get a "missing ns2.exe" error message. IF i force proton compatibility - I end up with an infinite black screen.  Sad to see this game no longer working :( if anyone has a fix/remedy please comment here... looking forward to anyone's help/support. thanks
title: Natural Selection 2

notes:
- On each game start comes the "black screen" (where only the menu options are visible) but it can be workarounded by setting resolution to something, then setting it back to the right one.
- One time wine reported ns2.exe as crashed (or something like that) and the game really completely  freezed.
- On every mapchange where mods/map needs to be downloaded, im getting disconnected with "timeout".
- Sometimes the game can not even quit normally, processes must be killed manually.
title: Natural Selection 2

notes:
Decent performance, no noticeable issues other than FXAA simply not working.

FXAA is enabled by default, and causes the screen to be completely black. This can be fixed by launching, force closing the game, then change the setting in the config file located at: /steamapps/compatdata/4920/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Application Data/Natural Selection 2/system_options.xml

In the config: "<anti-aliasing-type>fxaa</anti-aliasing-type>" change "fxaa" to "taa" or "off".
title: Natural Selection 2

notes: Performance is similar to running under windows. Had to delete x64/SparkCrashHandler.exe for the game to quit properly. Also starting the tutorials, challenges or a listen server doesn't work.
title: Natural Selection 2
